basic_details.job_title: NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur) Research Assistant and Field Investigator Walk-in Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026, including 1 post each for Research Assistant and Field Investigator.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Social Science Discipline with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. for Research Assistant; Graduation with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in Social Science Discipline (55% Minimum marks) with NET/M.Phil./ Ph.D. Field Investigator: Graduation with a minimum of 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month; Field Investigator: ₹20,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month Field Investigator: ₹20,000/- per month

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Hamirpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts is scheduled for 30 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in a Social Science Discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Field Investigator post is a Graduation degree with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected Research Assistant will receive a monthly salary of ₹37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected Field Investigator will receive a monthly salary of ₹20,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for these posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with one post for Research Assistant and one post for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original certificates and documents for verification, along with self-attested photocopies of degrees, certificates, and mark sheets.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the NIT Hamirpur office in Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts is scheduled for 30 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.
